# Copilot Instructions

Repository-specific guidance for Copilot in this workspace.

- Follow the project-wide rules in `AGENTS.md`.
- Prefer minimal, local edits over large rewrites.
- For C64 assembly changes, keep symbols/data labels stable unless required.
- Validate with `./shell/build.sh projects/sprite_demo/main.asm` (or active asm file) after edits.
- For level design updates, follow the `Level Design Checklist` in `AGENTS.md`.
